log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Tortle — Bardic Musician --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 18
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:16+4=20 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Tortle — Bardic Musician (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Tortle — Bardic Musician
→ Bite: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 18] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:14+10=24 vs AC 18] HIT! 19 damage. Tortle — Bardic Musician HP: 48/67
→ Bite: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 18] MISS.
